query: Rewrite this AI-generated paragraph to sound human: 'Our platform delves into the nuanced landscape of project management, seamlessly integrating robust workflows that harness the power of collaboration.'
expected_behavior: Runs Phase 1 Diagnosis: identifies at least 3 banned phrases from the input (delves, nuanced, landscape, seamlessly, robust, harness)
Runs Phase 2 Reconstruction: rewrites the paragraph with varied sentence length and concrete language
Output uses at least one very short sentence (under 6 words) to create rhythm variation
Every claim in the rewrite traces to a real product behavior described in the original (no new claims added)
